nodes.label: Categories are scoped per phase - the same name in two different phases     is t
nodes.norm_label: categories are scoped per phase - the same name in two different phases     is t

nodes.label: Applies every row in its own savepoint so one bad row doesn't abort the whole ba
nodes.norm_label: applies every row in its own savepoint so one bad row doesn't abort the whole ba

nodes.label: Creates the first Admin account via sql/001_schema.sql's sp_CreateFirstAdmin.  G
nodes.norm_label: creates the first admin account via sql/001_schema.sql's sp_createfirstadmin.  g

nodes.label: React Compiler
nodes.rationale: Not enabled on this template because of its impact on dev & build performance.

nodes.label: Categories (table)
nodes.rationale: Scoped per phase via UNIQUE(PhaseID, CategoryName) so the same name in two phases is two different rows. Categories/Phases were being confused with the separate Roles concept early on, so default seed rows (Polish/GLB/Render) were removed once a real admin taxonomy panel existed.

nodes.label: PhasePaths (table)
nodes.rationale: Stores only the root path; Pending/InProgress/Complete/<Username> subfolders are conventions computed under this root rather than stored per-row. The Assign action returns a clean 400 until at least one PhasePaths row exists for a phase.

nodes.label: FileVersions (table)
nodes.rationale: Versioning lives here instead of as columns on Files: Overwrite repoints CurrentVersionID, New Version inserts a row and repoints, Skip does neither. Full version history is preserved in every case.

nodes.label: TaskAssignments (table)
nodes.rationale: IsActive lets a file have exactly one live assignment; resets flip IsActive=0 and write an AuditTrail row rather than deleting history.

nodes.label: AuditTrail (table)
nodes.rationale: Append-only history of admin resets and manual completion-time edits, kept separate from the live TaskAssignments row.

nodes.label: FileTransferLog (table)
nodes.rationale: Durable record of the Copy-Verify-Delete pipeline's steps, used for crash recovery and for surfacing 'File Locked' errors to the UI.

nodes.label: Copy-Verify-Delete Pipeline
nodes.rationale: The filesystem move and the DB write can't be one atomic operation (SQL Server can't transaction an SMB copy), so the assignment flow is implemented as a durable state machine: every step is logged to FileTransferLog before it's attempted, so a crash mid-copy is recoverable on restart instead of silently corrupting state. The source folder is deleted in exactly one place, only after verification has logged success, so a failed delete is a cleanup warning rather than a data-loss condition.

nodes.label: Role-scoped Grid (server-side RBAC filtering)
nodes.rationale: Admin sees every row with full filters; an Artist's grid is hard-filtered server-side to AssignedToUserID=self with no client-side toggle to widen it, so privilege escalation via the client isn't possible.

nodes.label: Manual Import Mode (filename-only CSV)
nodes.rationale: For source CSVs that are just a list of file names with no phase/category/path columns. Reuses parse_csv_simple to build the exact same CsvImportRow shape the full-CSV path already produces, so preview_import/commit_import and the conflict-resolution UI need no changes at all.

nodes.label: Move Files (Category/Sub-Category/Phase)
nodes.rationale: move-category is pure metadata with no physical folder implication, so it's always allowed. move-phase has a physical implication (PhasePaths root differs per phase), so any file with an active assignment is skipped with a reason rather than force-moved, and a same-named-file collision in the target phase is reported as skipped instead of failing the whole batch.

nodes.label: Taxonomy Management (/taxonomy)
nodes.rationale: Phase/Category/Sub-Category are no longer seeded with defaults - Polish/GLB/Render shipped as example rows during early development but were removed once the schema had a real admin panel to define them explicitly, since they were being confused with the separate Roles concept.

nodes.label: JWT Authentication
nodes.rationale: JWT_SECRET_KEY auto-generates and persists to .env on first run if left blank. The client decodes the token for UI gating only - the server re-checks every permission independently.

nodes.label: Automatic Schema Migration
nodes.rationale: apply_schema() runs a small ordered migration list after confirming the base schema exists, so re-running create_database.py/setup.ps1 is enough to bring an existing DB up to date with no manual SQL for the common case.

nodes.label: _migrate_categories_to_phase_scoped()
nodes.rationale: Adds Categories.PhaseID; refuses to run if any Files.CategoryID is already set, since splitting a category used across multiple phases needs a human decision the script doesn't attempt.

nodes.label: pyproject.toml
nodes.rationale: Makes app an installable package so 'import app...' resolves regardless of which file or working directory it's run from - fixes ModuleNotFoundError when a file under app/ is run directly instead of via app.main.

nodes.label: Frontend (Command Center) - React + Vite + AG-Grid
nodes.rationale: Two run modes trade off differently: single-process (npm run build once, app/main.py serves frontend/dist via a catch-all route registered after all /api/* routers) matches production; dev mode runs a separate Vite server on :5173 that proxies /api/* to the backend on :8000, avoiding any CORS setup while hot-reloading.

nodes.label: bcrypt<4.1
nodes.rationale: Pinned below 4.1 because passlib 1.7.4 reads bcrypt.__about__, which was removed in bcrypt>=4.1; pinned until passlib releases a fix.
